generated_prompt: Design an immersive digital art portfolio hero with scroll-driven spatial transformation, layered depth, pointer response, and at least three clear visual states. Preserve the current artwork and content while translating the mechanism into an isolated strong-visual prototype with a mobile and reduced-motion fallback. 沉浸式数字艺术作品集、强视觉 hero、标志性动效、滚动与空间变化。
